typography.font_family: System default (San Francisco on iOS, Roboto on Android)

brand.name: Fume Coworking
brand.tagline: Your Home Office, Away From Home

sections.name: Header
sections.description: Safe area with logo, location selector dropdown, notification bell icon

sections.name: Hero Banner
sections.description: Full-width gradient card (black to blue-950) with animated text cycling through 'Away From Home', 'Near You', 'For Your Team', 'For Your Startup', 'Every Workday'. Two touchable buttons: Book a Tour, View Workspaces. Background image with overlay.

sections.name: QuickActions
sections.description: Horizontal scroll of 4 quick action cards: Day Pass, Book Meeting, Virtual Office, Contact Us with icons

sections.name: LocationsPreview
sections.description: Vertical list of 2 location cards (Delhi & Gurgaon) showing image, name, address, seat count (250), connectivity badge

sections.name: PopularWorkspaces
sections.description: Horizontal scroll of top 3 workspace cards: Dedicated Desk, Private Cabin, Meeting Room with price and Book button

sections.name: AmenitiesPreview
sections.description: Grid of 6 amenity icons with labels: WiFi, Coffee, Meeting Rooms, 24/7 Access, Parking, Security

sections.name: CTABanner
sections.description: Gradient banner with 'Ready to Experience Fume?' and primary CTA button

screens.name: LocationsScreen
screens.description: List of 2 coworking locations. Each location card shows: cover image, location name, address, seat count, connectivity, features list (5 items). Tap to expand or view details.

screens.name: WorkspacesScreen
screens.description: Tabbed list of 7 workspace types with segment control: All | Hourly | Monthly. Each card shows: icon/emoji, name, description, price, period, features list, Book button. Popular items marked with amber badge.

workspace_types.name: Open Dedicated
workspace_types.description: Your go-to spot for daily grind

workspace_types.name: Meeting Room
workspace_types.description: Discuss and decide with your team

screens.name: AmenitiesScreen
screens.description: Grid of 10 amenity items (2 columns). Each item: icon, name, description. Tap for more details.

screens.name: BookingsScreen
screens.description: List of user's bookings with status: Upcoming, Active, Past. Each booking shows: workspace type, location, date/time, status badge. Empty state with CTA to browse workspaces.

screens.name: ProfileScreen
screens.description: User profile with: avatar, name, membership status, member ID. Menu items: My Bookings, Payment History, Support, Settings, Logout.

screens.name: WorkspaceDetailScreen
screens.description: Full workspace details with booking flow: select location, date picker, time slots, add-ons, price summary, confirm booking button

screens.name: ContactScreen
screens.description: Contact form: name, email, phone, message. Also show phone number, email, and office addresses. Map integration optional.

components.name: LocationCard
components.description: Card with cover image, gradient overlay, location name, address, seat/connectivity badges, tap for details

components.name: WorkspaceCard
components.description: Card with emoji icon, name, description, price, period, features list, popular badge (amber), Book button

components.name: AmenityCard
components.description: Square card with icon, label, tap for details

components.name: QuickActionCard
components.description: Small horizontal card with icon, label, tap action

components.name: PrimaryButton
components.description: Full-width touchable gradient button (blue-600 to blue-800), white text

components.name: BookingCard
components.description: Card showing booking details with status badge (Upcoming/Active/Completed)

components.name: AnimatedText
components.description: Rotating text component cycling through phrases with fade/slide animation

components.name: IconButton
components.description: Touchable icon in header or action bars

key_features: React Navigation with bottom tabs + stack navigator
Safe area handling for notch devices
assets_needed: Tab bar icons (SF Symbols / Material icons)
prompt:
Create a premium coworking space mobile app called 'Fume Coworking' using React Native with Expo and React Navigation. Use a dark theme with black (#0a0a0a) and blue (#1e40af) colors.

SCREEN STRUCTURE (Bottom Tab Navigation):
1. **HomeScreen**: Header with logo & location selector, animated hero banner with rotating text (Away From Home, Near You, For Your Team, For Your Startup, Every Workday), quick action cards (Day Pass, Book Meeting, Virtual Office, Contact), locations preview list (Delhi & Gurgaon - 250 seats each), popular workspaces horizontal scroll, amenities grid preview, CTA banner

2. **LocationsScreen**: List of 2 locations - Delhi (Netaji Subhash Palace) and Gurgaon (Udyog Vihar). Each card: cover image, gradient overlay, name, address, seats count, connectivity badge, features list, tap for details

3. **WorkspacesScreen**: Segmented control (All/Hourly/Monthly), 7 workspace cards: Day Pass ₹499/day, Open Dedicated ₹8000/mo, Cubicle ₹12000/mo, Private Cabin ₹35000/mo, Meeting Room ₹500/hr, Conference Room ₹1500/hr, Virtual Office ₹2000/mo. Each card: emoji icon, name, description, price, period, features, Book button. Mark popular items with amber badge

4. **AmenitiesScreen**: 2-column grid of 10 amenities: WiFi, Coffee, Meeting Rooms, 24/7 Access, Parking, Printer, Reception, Security, Kitchen, Lockers - each with icon and description

5. **ProfileScreen**: User avatar, name, membership status, menu items (My Bookings, Payment, Support, Settings, Logout)

STACK SCREENS:
- WorkspaceDetailScreen: Full workspace info with booking flow (select location, date, time, confirm)
- ContactScreen: Contact form with name/email/phone/message fields

DESIGN: Dark theme throughout, gradient buttons (blue-600 to blue-800), card layouts, horizontal scroll carousels, smooth animations with Reanimated, proper safe area handling, 44pt minimum touch targets.
